{{CargoRelic
|name=Golden Controller
|class_id=20140
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This controller used to belong to a referee in the arena, a former powerful combatant that had long retired. After seeing the snail's strength, it became a Demon God Hitman to test the snail. It gave this precious controller to the snail and then became a referee again after its defeat.
|fame=15
|art=29
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail HP +10<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +1<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail DEF +1<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail RUSH +1<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100
|ss2=Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail HP +20<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +2<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail DEF +2<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail RUSH +2<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100
|ss3=Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail RUSH +3<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100
|ss4=Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail RUSH +3<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100
|ss7=Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail HP +30<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail RUSH +3<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
